headline: S&P Global Reshapes Energy Data With Titan And Expanded SLB Partnership
summary: S&P Global (NYSE:SPGI) is selling its geoscience and petroleum engineering software portfolio to SLB as part of a realignment of its upstream energy business. Alongside the sale, the company is launching Titan, an AI powered platform designed to support upstream data discovery and analytics. The broadened partnership with SLB includes expanded data distribution and collaboration on new AI models for the energy sector.
